err.invoice.save_forbidden_not_draft: Save forbidden: this is not a draft.
err.invoice.delete_only_draft: Deletion forbidden: only drafts can be deleted.
err.creditnote_only_issued: A credit note can only be created from an issued invoice.
err.creditnote_no_id: Credit note created, but id was not returned.
err.inbound.decide_only_received: Decision is only possible when status is Received.
err.inbound.delete_only_status: Deletion is allowed only for: Received / Invalid / Error.

conformity.flows.title: Expected flows
conformity.flows.hint: France: B2B/B2G (real-time e-invoicing) + B2C (periodic e-reporting). International: e-reporting Flow 8 (invoices) + Flow 10 (payments).
conformity.todo_backend: The “Send now” / “Refresh” buttons will be connected via IPC + database (send queue, statuses, errors).

reform.summary.title: Summary
reform.summary.not_concerned_text: No e-reporting if no B2C and no international (France B2B = mainly e-invoicing). Current fields: scope=FR, periodicity=M, archiving=ON, platform=—

dashboard.recognizedMonthlyNotAvailable: Monthly recognized revenue is not available yet.
payments.entry.title: New payment
payments.entry.hint: Select an invoice only when you want to record a new payment.
payments.overview.invoices_hint: See paid, partially paid and outstanding invoices at a glance.
payments.history_all.title: All payments
payments.history_selected.title: Invoice payments
payments.error.no_balance: This invoice no longer has an amount to collect.

clients.import.err_empty: The CSV file is empty or unreadable.
clients.import.ok_analyzed: Analysis complete. Check the mapping, then import.
common.title: Title
conformity.eligibility.b2c_and_intl: E-reporting is required for B2C and international activity.
conformity.eligibility.intl_only: E-reporting is required for international activity (flow 8 and payments).
conformity.eligibility.none: E-reporting is not required: no B2C or international activity.
inbound.alert.vat_missing: At least one line has no VAT rate.
invoices.deposits.title: Linked deposits
quotes.deposits.title: Quote deposits
quotes.deposits.hint: Deposit invoices generated from this quote.
status.search_unavailable: Search is unavailable on this page.
exports.email_prepared: Email prepared for {email} — attach the downloaded PDF.
integrations.pa.title: Approved Platform connection
integrations.pa.hint: Server connector for the selected Approved Platform API (XP Z12-013 profile to be adapted to the provider).
integrations.archive.title: Evidential electronic archiving
integrations.archive.hint: Automatically deposits PDFs with the selected electronic archive and stores the deposit receipt.
integrations.configured: Configured — the secret is encrypted on the server
conformity.reason.b2c: You issue B2C invoices: e-reporting flows are required.
conformity.reason.intl: You have international transactions: e-reporting flows are required.
conformity.reason.none: Domestic B2B only: still check your receiving and issuing obligations.
conformity.help.scope_fr: FR: mainly French activity. INTL: transactions outside France.
conformity.help.scope_intl: INTL: transactions outside France, inside or outside the EU.
conformity.help.periodicity_fr: France: transmission frequency depends on the VAT scheme.
conformity.help.periodicity_intl: Choose your internal preparation and control frequency.
conformity.help.archiving: Enabled: PDFs are deposited with the configured archive and the receipt is retained.
conformity.help.platform_fr: France: select an Approved Platform and configure its API.
conformity.help.platform_intl: International: specify the transmission portal or platform.
conformity.help.next_due: Next internal deadline, separate from an automatic submission.
conformity.help.intl: Yes when you sell or purchase outside France.
conformity.eligibility.less: 🟡 E-reporting may be limited; confirm based on your transactions.
conformity.ai.missing_scope_intl: INTL scope required for international transactions
conformity.ai.current_fields: Current fields: scope={scope}, frequency={periodicity}, archiving={archiving}, platform={platform}
conformity.ai.q_intl: Question 2/5 — Do you sell or provide services outside France? (yes/no)
conformity.ai.q_platform: Question 3/5 — Which route do you want to use? PA or OTHER
conformity.ai.q_monthly: Question 4/5 — Is your reporting frequency monthly? (yes/no)
conformity.ai.welcome: Hello 👋 Let’s run a short e-reporting diagnosis. Answer with yes, no, PA or OTHER.
conformity.ai.already_finished: The diagnosis is complete. You can apply recommendations or check completeness.
conformity.ai.calculating: Calculating recommendations from your company and answers…
conformity.ai.check_done: ✅ Check complete. Review the missing fields and summary.
integrations.country.title: National e-invoicing connection
integrations.country.hint: The expected profile is selected from the country declared in the company record.
integrations.test_disclaimer: A saved configuration is not proof of compliance. Connected status requires a provider test; production then requires provider approval and business acceptance tests.
integrations.country_mismatch: The country changed: save the connector again before enabling it.
integrations.configured_test_required: Configuration saved — technical test still required
integrations.profile.fr.title: France — Approved Platform (PA)
integrations.profile.fr.hint: The establishment SIRET and identifiers supplied by the PA are required.
integrations.profile.rs.title: Serbia — Sistem eFaktura (SEF)
integrations.profile.rs.hint: D2F is in Serbia: the expected connector is the SEF API, with the PIB and SEF API key.
integrations.profile.it.title: Italy — Sistema di Interscambio (SdI)
integrations.profile.it.hint: The XML invoice passes through SdI via an authorised channel or provider; enter the Codice Destinatario or PEC.
integrations.profile.es.title: Spain — AEAT VERI*FACTU
integrations.profile.es.hint: VERI*FACTU concerns invoice-record reporting to the AEAT; FACe is a separate channel for public-sector invoices.
integrations.profile.default.title: EN16931 profile — national connector to qualify
integrations.profile.default.hint: This country has no validated D2F profile yet. National compliance will not be shown until the channel is qualified.
company.identifier.fr.error: The establishment SIRET must contain exactly 14 digits.
company.identifier.rs.error: The Serbian PIB must contain exactly 9 digits.
company.identifier.it.error: Enter an 11-digit Partita IVA or a 16-character Codice Fiscale.
quotes.lifecycle.new: Complete the quote, then save it or use Validate / Send.
quotes.lifecycle.draft: The quote can be edited. Validate and send it before recording the customer's decision.
quotes.lifecycle.sent: The quote has been sent: you can now record its acceptance or rejection.
quotes.lifecycle.accepted: The quote is accepted and locked. You can create a deposit or final invoice.
quotes.lifecycle.rejected: The quote is rejected and locked. Create a new quote if a new proposal is required.
quotes.lifecycle.cancelled: The quote is cancelled and locked.
err.quote.must_be_sent_for_decision: The quote must be validated and sent first.
err.quote.only_draft_editable: Only a draft quote can be edited.
err.quote.only_draft_can_be_sent: Only a draft quote can be validated and sent.
err.quote.must_be_accepted_for_invoice: The quote must be accepted before creating an invoice.
err.quote.only_draft_deletable: Only a draft quote can be deleted.
status.theme_accent_selected: Interface colour selected — save the Company page.
err.quote.decision_not_allowed: This quote already has a final decision.
clients.peppol.title: Customer electronic routing
clients.peppol.hint: Look up the official identifier before a PEPPOL export. The customer record and PDF remain available when no match is found.
clients.peppol.changed: Identifier changed: search again before structured transmission.
clients.peppol.disclaimer: The Directory helps identify the participant; the access provider must still confirm delivery capability.
clients.peppol.not_found_help: No participant was found. You can save the customer and create a PDF, but structured export stays blocked until an electronic address is supplied.
clients.peppol.found_help: Participant found: {name} ({scheme}:{id}). Confirm receiving capability with your provider before sending.
clients.peppol.not_found_saved: Client saved — PEPPOL participant not found
clients.peppol.verified_saved: PEPPOL identifier verified and saved in the client record
exports.readiness.title: Pre-transmission check
exports.readiness.select: Select an invoice to check the country profile.
exports.readiness.send_blocked: Correct the listed information before transmission
compliance.issue.bt_1: The invoice must be issued and numbered.
compliance.issue.bt_27: The seller legal name is required.
compliance.issue.bt_29: The seller legal identifier is required.
compliance.issue.bt_50: The customer address is required before structured export.
compliance.issue.bt_52: The customer city is required before structured export.
compliance.issue.bt_53: The customer postal code is required before structured export.
compliance.issue.bg_25: The invoice must contain at least one line.
compliance.issue.fr_bt_34: French routing requires a 0225 seller electronic address in the Company record.
compliance.issue.fr_bt_49: French B2B/B2G routing requires a 0225 electronic address validated through the PA/PPF.
compliance.issue.it_fatturapa: Italy requires FatturaPA XML through SdI; generic UBL is blocked.
compliance.issue.es_verifactu: Spain requires a separate AEAT SIF/VERI*FACTU record; UBL alone is insufficient.
conformity.evidence.title: Evidence and audit-trail file
conformity.evidence.subtitle: Documents linking the actual transaction, invoice and payment, ready for a tax audit.
conformity.evidence.description: Description of the control or business link
conformity.evidence.description_ph: Explain how this document supports the transaction
conformity.evidence.empty: No evidence uploaded. Start with the invoicing procedure, then link supporting documents to invoices.
conformity.evidence.count: {count} active evidence item(s), each tracked with SHA-256.
conformity.evidence.uploaded: Evidence uploaded, fingerprint calculated and operation recorded in the audit log.
conformity.evidence.exported: Manifest exported with the inventory and fingerprints.
conformity.evidence.integrity_ok: Fingerprint verified: the file is intact.
conformity.evidence.archiving: Sending evidence to the configured archive…
conformity.evidence.archive_ok: Evidence sent to the archive; the receipt is retained in transmissions.
conformity.evidence.void_confirm: Void this evidence? It will remain stored with its fingerprint and the action will be audited.
conformity.evidence.void_ok: Evidence voided but retained to preserve traceability.
conformity.evidence.profile.fr_paf.label: France — PAF file and supporting evidence
conformity.evidence.profile.fr_paf.expla: The PAF documents controls and links the transaction, order, delivery or service, invoice and payment. It is produced to the tax authority on request; it is not attached to every invoice.
conformity.evidence.profile.it_conservaz: The SdI flow and compliant electronic preservation replace the French documentary model. Additional business evidence remains useful during an audit.
conformity.evidence.profile.es_sif_verif: Records must ensure integrity, retention, accessibility, legibility, traceability and immutability. This is not the French PAF.
conformity.evidence.profile.rs_sef_stora: Private-sector invoices are retained in SEF or by an authorised intermediary. Supporting evidence remains available here without being sent with every invoice.
conformity.evidence.profile.generic_audi: Controls and evidence — local rules to be qualified
Authenticity, integrity and legibility are EU principles, but the PAF name and preservation rules vary by country.
reporting.settings.title: Regulatory filings
reporting.settings.hint: These choices determine the obligations shown. Operations and receipts remain in the Regulatory filings tab.
reporting.settings.fr.hint: Declare B2C, international activity and cash-accounting VAT to determine the French data to prepare.
reporting.settings.rs.hint: Separate SEF invoices, foreign-person VAT records and the separate fiscalisation of retail receipts.
reporting.settings.it.hint: Separate SdI invoices, corrispettivi and cross-border transactions.
reporting.settings.es.hint: Specify whether the establishment is subject to SII and uses VERI*FACTU or NO VERI*FACTU.
reporting.settings.rs_fiscal_device: Retail receipts are handled by a separate approved fiscal device
reporting.adapter.title: Regulatory filing adapter
reporting.adapter.hint: Enable only after format validation and business acceptance tests with the national provider.
reporting.adapter.qualified: The provider's business acceptance test is approved for this country
reporting.profile.fr.title: France — E-invoicing and e-reporting
reporting.profile.fr.summary: Structured invoice flows and transaction or payment data delivered to an Approved Platform.
reporting.profile.rs.title: Serbia — SEF, electronic VAT and fiscalisation
reporting.profile.rs.summary: SEF invoices, electronic VAT records and receipts sent through a separate approved fiscal device.
reporting.profile.it.title: Italy — SdI and tax transmissions
reporting.profile.it.summary: Invoices via SdI, corrispettivi telematici and cross-border transactions under the Italian profile.
reporting.profile.es.title: Spain — AEAT, VERI*FACTU and SII
reporting.profile.es.summary: VERI*FACTU or secured invoicing records, and SII books where applicable.
reporting.profile.default.title: National filings to be qualified
reporting.profile.default.summary: No validated filing profile is available for the declared country.
reporting.review.step.open_documents: Open each file below and check the source document.
reporting.review.step.configure: Configure and test the national connector and its regulatory adapter.
reporting.review.step.rebuild: Return to Declarations and select Prepare period: compliant files will move to Ready.
reporting.review.ready: The files and connection are ready. Open them for a final review, then submit the ready files.
reporting.review.external: This obligation is handled in an external system. Open the files for reconciliation, then check the receipt in the relevant portal.
reporting.review.not_applicable: No action is required for this period with the current settings.
reporting.review.empty: No source file is linked to this obligation for the period.
reporting.review.source_unavailable: The source document is not available from this screen.
reporting.obligations.title: Period obligations
reporting.obligations.hint: Volumes are candidate records calculated from the establishment's data.
reporting.obligations.empty: No obligation was calculated for this period.
reporting.transmissions.title: Transmissions and receipts
reporting.transmissions.hint: National connector history with statuses returned by the provider.
reporting.configuration.ready: Connector and business adapter validated: ready records may be transmitted.
reporting.configuration.blocked: Preparation is available. Transmission remains blocked until the national connector and business adapter are validated.
reporting.send.started: Regulatory transmission delivered to the connector.
reporting.obligation.fr_structured_invoi: Domestic B2B invoices routed through the Approved Platform; this is not aggregated flow 10 reporting.
reporting.obligation.fr_transaction_data: Invoice data not already carried as a structured invoice through the platform.
reporting.obligation.fr_payment_data_10_: Prepared when VAT is due upon collection, excluding cases outside the reporting rule.
reporting.obligation.fr_b2c_transactions: Aggregated consumer sales not covered by a transmitted structured invoice.
reporting.obligation.fr_b2c_payments_10_: Aggregated B2C collections when VAT is due upon collection.
reporting.obligation.rs_sef_sales.title: Domestic SEF sales invoices
reporting.obligation.rs_sef_sales.descri: Electronic invoices to submit and track in Sistem eFaktura.
Retail sales are transmitted through an approved fiscal device separate from SEF.
reporting.obligation.rs_foreign_vat_reco: Cross-border transactions may require an individual VAT record or internal invoice; they are not limited to payments.
reporting.obligation.rs_aggregate_vat.de: Preparation of period electronic VAT records based on the transaction type.
reporting.obligation.it_sdi_invoices.des: FatturaPA XML invoices sent through the validated SdI channel.
reporting.obligation.it_corrispettivi.de: Retail sales transmitted using the appropriate fiscal telematic device.
reporting.obligation.it_cross_border.des: Cross-border data and TD17, TD18 or TD19 document types as applicable.
reporting.obligation.es_verifactu_record: Immediate record submission to AEAT, or secured retention when NO VERI*FACTU mode is selected.
reporting.obligation.es_sii_books.title: SII VAT books
reporting.obligation.es_sii_books.descri: Issued and received invoice register details for establishments subject to or opting into SII.
reporting.obligation.es_cancellation_rec: Traceability of cancellations in the Spanish invoicing system.
reporting.obligation.generic_country_pro: Preparation remains blocked until the country's rules and connector are validated.
companion.company.title: Configure the company
companion.company.summary: Keep legal, tax, banking and regulatory connection details in one controlled place.
companion.company.step1: Check identity, country, tax identifiers and contact details.
companion.company.step2: Add the logo, PDF wording, bank details and expected national profile.
companion.company.step3: Save and test every connector before treating it as operational.
companion.company.expected: A complete issuer profile with an explicit connector status.
companion.dashboard.title: Run the day
companion.dashboard.summary: Use the overview to identify amounts and records that need attention.
companion.dashboard.step1: Review revenue, receipts and pending documents.
companion.dashboard.step2: Open the relevant module when an indicator looks inconsistent.
companion.dashboard.step3: Refresh after corrections to confirm the new totals.
companion.dashboard.expected: A reliable view of current priorities.
companion.clients.title: Create an invoice-ready customer
companion.clients.summary: A complete record prevents invoice rejection and prepares electronic routing.
companion.clients.step1: Create the customer with country, B2B or B2C status and identifiers.
companion.clients.step2: Find and confirm the PEPPOL identifier when routing applies.
companion.clients.step3: Save the record before creating a quote or invoice.
companion.clients.expected: A customer usable for PDF and ready for supported structured formats.
companion.items.title: Prepare the catalogue
companion.items.summary: Reusable items make entry faster and keep prices, VAT and descriptions consistent.
companion.items.step1: Create a clear reference and understandable description.
companion.items.step2: Set the unit price, unit and applicable VAT rule.
companion.items.step3: Save and reuse the item in quotes and invoices.
companion.items.expected: A consistent catalogue with fewer entry errors.
companion.quotes.title: From quote to decision
companion.quotes.summary: A quote follows draft, issue, acceptance or rejection, then invoicing.
companion.quotes.step1: Select the customer and add lines, terms and any deposit.
companion.quotes.step2: Save, then validate and send the quote.
companion.quotes.step3: Mark it accepted or rejected before converting it to an invoice.
companion.quotes.expected: A visible, reliable status reflected on the dashboard.
companion.invoices.title: Issue a correct invoice
companion.invoices.summary: An issued invoice is a business record, so review it before locking its number.
companion.invoices.step1: Select the customer and check lines, VAT, due date and references.
companion.invoices.step2: Save the draft and issue it only after the final review.
companion.invoices.step3: Record payments or issue a credit note for corrections after issue.
companion.invoices.expected: A consistent, traceable invoice exportable in permitted formats.
companion.payments.title: Track receipts
companion.payments.summary: The overview separates paid, partial, overdue and credit-note-neutralised invoices.
companion.payments.step1: Filter invoices requiring payment and open the relevant record.
companion.payments.step2: Check the balance, linked credit notes and existing payments.
companion.payments.step3: Record the new payment and verify the remaining balance.
companion.payments.expected: No amount due on an invoice fully neutralised by a credit note.
companion.inbound.title: Process a supplier invoice
companion.inbound.summary: Every received document should be readable, checked and accepted, rejected or disputed.
companion.inbound.step1: Import or select the received invoice.
companion.inbound.step2: Check supplier, identifiers, dates, amounts, VAT and attachments.
companion.inbound.step3: Choose the appropriate decision and retain the processing evidence.
companion.inbound.expected: A supplier invoice with a clear status and usable trace.
companion.exports.title: Prepare an outgoing document
companion.exports.summary: Readiness checks determine whether PDF, XML or structured transmission is available.
companion.exports.step1: Select an issued quote or invoice.
companion.exports.step2: Run the check and fix every blocking field.
companion.exports.step3: Generate PDF or XML and transmit only through a qualified channel.
companion.exports.expected: A readable file and, where required, a structured export for the selected profile.
companion.conformity.title: Prepare declarations
companion.conformity.summary: This module converts period transactions into files to review, transmit and reconcile.
companion.conformity.step1: Choose the period and prepare candidate files.
companion.conformity.step2: Open each To review line to inspect source documents and issues.
companion.conformity.step3: Transmit ready files only, then check acknowledgements.
companion.conformity.expected: Each obligation has a status, source evidence and transmission receipt.
companion.audit.title: Read the evidence trail
companion.audit.summary: The log links every operation to its author, time and control fingerprint.
companion.audit.step1: Load the events for the required scope.
companion.audit.step2: Verify the chain and investigate every break or anomaly.
companion.audit.step3: Export evidence needed for review and retain it with related documents.
companion.audit.expected: A readable and verifiable trace of completed operations.
discount.subtotal: Subtotal excl. VAT before document discount
import.csv_no_rows: The CSV file contains no usable rows.

clients.import.choose_or_drop: Click to choose a CSV file
clients.import.drop_hint: or drop it here · 10 MB maximum
clients.import.recognized_columns_hint: name, email, phone, country, VAT, legal ID, address and payment terms

clients.import.err_too_large: The file exceeds the 10 MB maximum size.
clients.import.analysis_summary: Analysis complete: {rows} row(s), {valid} importable, {mapped} mapped column(s), “{delimiter}” separator.
app.desc.financial: Finance, projections and accounting proposals under control.
app.desc.expenses: Expense reports, mobile receipts, submission and approval.
financial.proposals.title: Accounting proposals
financial.proposals.empty: No accounting proposal. They will be generated from validated events.
financial.invoices.title: Issued customer invoices
expenses.create.title: Start an expense report
expenses.capture.title: Upload a receipt
expenses.capture.subtitle: Photograph the receipt with your smartphone or choose a file. The original is kept separately from OCR.
expenses.capture.drop_title: Take a photo or drop a receipt
expenses.capture.drop_hint: JPEG, PNG, WebP or PDF · 10 MB maximum
expenses.capture.provenance: Capture time, user, device context and SHA-256 fingerprint are retained. OCR remains a suggestion to validate.
expenses.capture.invalid_type: Use JPEG, PNG, WebP or PDF
expenses.capture.no_file: Take a photo or choose a file
expenses.reports.title: Expense reports
expenses.reports.empty: No expense report. Create the first draft above.
expenses.detail.empty: Lines and receipts will appear here.
expenses.capture.line_empty: Add a line to the report first
app.desc.financial-overview: Live read-only indicators from D2F Gestion.
app.desc.financial-reconciliation: Invoices, payments and balances to reconcile.
app.desc.financial-rules: Deterministic rules, versions and applicable Country Packs.
app.desc.expenses-reports: Create lines, attach receipts and submit.
app.desc.expenses-capture: Photograph or upload a receipt and preserve the original.
app.desc.expenses-approvals: Decision queue, findings and audit trail.
app.desc.expenses-rules: Rules by country, period and version.
financial.overview.title: Financial cockpit
financial.overview.subtitle: A financial view of live D2F Gestion data without changing commercial records.
financial.kpi.revenue_hint: Issued final invoices, net of credit notes
financial.proposals.subtitle: Review the source, amounts, suggested account and rule trace before validation.
financial.reconciliation.title: Reconciliation
financial.reconciliation.subtitle: Compare issued invoices, recorded payments and the remaining balance.
financial.rules.title: Rules & simulations
financial.rules.subtitle: Versioned registry of deterministic rules. Unqualified country rules never take part in a decision.
financial.rules.waiting: Enter an amount to run generic controls.
financial.rules.result_incomplete: Generic controls passed. Country accounting result remains incomplete until the Country Pack is qualified.
financial.rules.result_missing: Missing amount: simulation is incomplete; zero is never assumed.
expenses.overview.title: Expense dashboard
expenses.overview.subtitle: From captured receipt to reimbursement, with human control and traceability.
expenses.reports.subtitle: Prepare a report, add lines, then submit it when receipts are complete.
expenses.approvals.title: Approvals
expenses.approvals.subtitle: Decide only on submitted reports, with comments, rule findings and audit trail.
expenses.rules.title: Rules & allowances
expenses.rules.subtitle: See what applies, is under review or blocked for the country and expense date.
expenses.rules.no_default_hint: Missing data never silently becomes zero, false or empty. The engine returns incomplete and requests validation.
expenses.foundation.pending: Interface ready · Expenses database activation required to save
expenses.foundation.required: The Expenses data foundation must be activated before saving.
financial.proposals.queue_hint: Each decision records the actor, date, rule and version.
financial.reconciliation.source_hint: Operational data from D2F Gestion; no accounting entry is created here.
financial.rules.balance: Checks debit and credit balance before a proposal can be validated.
financial.rules.match: Matches payments explicitly linked to invoices and reports discrepancies.
financial.rules.country: Accounting, tax and legal mappings remain inactive until local qualification.
financial.rules.simulation_hint: A simulation produces explanations and findings; it changes no business data.
expenses.rules.amount: Checks that net + tax = gross with an explicit rounding rule.
expenses.rules.duplicate: Searches for duplicates without automatically deleting or rejecting an expense.
expenses.rules.country: Receipt thresholds, recoverable VAT, mileage and per diem remain inactive until qualification.
companion.financial-overview.title: Financial cockpit
companion.financial-overview.summary: Read live Gestion indicators without changing commercial data.
companion.financial-overview.step3: Open the workflow that needs action
companion.financial-proposals.title: Accounting proposals
companion.financial-proposals.summary: Turn validated events into explainable proposals, never automatic entries.
companion.financial-proposals.step2: Read its source, rule and version
companion.financial-proposals.step3: Validate, return or correct with a trace
companion.financial-proposals.expected: A controlled proposal before any posting.
companion.financial-reconciliation.title: Reconciliation
companion.financial-reconciliation.summa: Explain every balance between invoice and payment.
companion.financial-rules.title: Rules & simulations
companion.financial-rules.summary: Check the identity, version and effect of every rule.
companion.financial-rules.step2: Check the applicable Rule Set status
companion.financial-rules.expected: An explainable or explicitly incomplete result.
companion.expenses-overview.title: Expenses dashboard
companion.expenses-overview.summary: Track the full lifecycle from report to reimbursement.
companion.expenses-overview.expected: A clear work queue with no hidden status.
companion.expenses-reports.title: My expense reports
companion.expenses-reports.summary: Prepare a complete report before submission.
companion.expenses-reports.step1: Create the report with purpose and currency
companion.expenses-reports.expected: A complete report ready for review.
companion.expenses-capture.title: Mobile capture
companion.expenses-capture.summary: Preserve the original receipt and its provenance.
companion.expenses-capture.step1: Select the report and expense line
companion.expenses-capture.step3: Review the file, then save the original
companion.expenses-capture.expected: A timestamped, fingerprinted original linked to the expense.
companion.expenses-approvals.title: Approvals
companion.expenses-approvals.summary: Decide with findings, comments and role separation.
companion.expenses-approvals.step3: Approve, return or reject with a reason
companion.expenses-rules.title: Rules & allowances
companion.expenses-rules.summary: Use only the qualified pack for the country and period.
companion.expenses-rules.step2: Check pack version, effect and status
companion.expenses-rules.step3: Block or request validation when data is missing
companion.expenses-rules.expected: No invented or default legal threshold.

financial.task.activate_hint: Create a tracked request with D2F
expenses.task.approval_hint: Review controls and make a decision
expenses.task.clear_hint: Create a report or view history.
platform.country_pack.action_hint: Request Country Pack validation before using its rules in a decision.
payments.operation.payment_hint: The payment reduces the balance of the selected invoice.
payments.operation.deposit_hint: Select a paid deposit for the same customer and, when available, the same quote.
payments.operation.partial_credit_hint: Enter the gross amount to cancel. A draft credit note will be created for review before issuance.
payments.error.no_deposit: No paid deposit invoice is available for this invoice.
payments.error.amount_required: An amount greater than 0 is required.
payments.error.amount_exceeds: The amount exceeds the remaining balance.
payments.error.credit_missing_id: Credit note created without a returned identifier.
payments.status.partial_credit_created: Partial credit note created as a draft for review.

invoices.credit_source.hint: Invoices issued in D2F and imported invoices can be selected.
